markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To learn from Dan Ahmadi about Upside's successful marketing event and gather insights for planning a similar event with Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event details: 110 attendees, $50K budget, held at The Battery (exclusive venue), 4:30-10PM on a weekday](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Format: Lightning talks (20 min), panel discussion (1 hr), followed by networking dinner](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Success factors: High-profile speakers, exclusive venue, strategic timing, and careful attendee curation](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Post-event engagement: On-site photographer, shared photo drive, encouraged LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

## Topics

### Event Structure and Timing

  - [4:30 PM doors open, 5:45 PM start time](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [20-minute lightning talks, followed by 1-hour panel discussion](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Dinner and networking until 10 PM close](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Weekday evening (Tuesday-Thursday, 4-7 PM) ideal for target audience](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Total content time: \~1.5 hours, allowing ample networking time](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Venue and Logistics

  - [Held at The Battery penthouse (exclusive, hard-to-access location)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Theater-style seating for talks/panel, later rearranged for networking](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Multiple food stations (kebab, pizza, pasta) instead of sit-down dinner](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [AV setup: Multiple cameras, livestream, confidence monitor, music](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Cost breakdown: Venue/food ($30K+), AV ($10K+), other costs (\~$2K)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### Attendee Management

  - [130 registered, 110 attended (high attendance rate)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Invite-only, free event; not publicly advertised](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Used Luma for registration; set low initial cap to create waitlist](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Careful curation of attendees, focusing on B2B CMOs and target market](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Frequent pre-event communication to confirm attendance](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

### Content and Speakers

  - [5 CMO panelists (usually 3 CMOs + 1 VP Marketing + 1 finance/rev ops)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Lightning talks: 5-minute, non-pitchy presentations on new tech](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Panel discussion: 1-hour on relevant industry topics](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Planned roundtables were scrapped due to organic networking success](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Promotion and Engagement

  - [Easy to promote due to high-profile speakers and exclusive venue](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [On-site photographer; shared photo drive with attendees post-event](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Encouraged LinkedIn posts (10+ attendees posted)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Some confusion about event sponsors in social posts](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Sponsorship and Costs

  - [Total cost: $50,000 ($40K base + $10K food)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Split between Upside ($10K), Graphite ($10K), XYZ (VC, $30K)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Additional $5K sponsorship from SQL](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Consider using an exclusive venue like The Battery for the Webflow event](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Plan for a weekday evening (Tuesday-Thursday, 4-7 PM) timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Curate a high-profile speaker lineup to drive registrations](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Implement strategic attendee management (waitlist, careful curation)](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Arrange on-site photography and encourage post-event social sharing](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Explore Lyft vouchers as a transportation option for attendees](https://fathom.video/share/WUBPX1EkkAGGYyDR34VNnCTATT_VNezo?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
